notes: Attempt 2 after rate-limit abort. Suite re-run per instructions with flexible runtime-resolution of categories.

testCases.title: Category Navigation - Main Menu
testCases.notes: Main Navigation menubar has 15 top-level items (Alcoholic Drinks, Accessories, Jewelry and gems, Car covers, Home appliance, Juice, Kitchen supplies, Products with options, Soft drinks, Snacks, Printers, Rental home, TV new, All BRANDS, SEE ALL PRODUCTS). Clicked /alcoholic-drinks: HTTP 200, H1='Alcoholic drinks', breadcrumb='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks', 20 results. No JS TypeError.
consoleErrors: 2x 404 on product image threecentsCherry-Soda_*.png — product image asset missing, not blocking

testCases.title: Category Page - Product Grid View
testCases.notes: Grid view is default on /alcoholic-drinks. Toggle buttons 'view-switcher.grid-view-tab' and 'view-switcher.list-view-tab' present. First card has class 'vc-product-card--view-mode--grid'. Cards show image, name, price.

testCases.title: Category Page - Product List View
testCases.notes: Clicked List view tab. First card className switched to 'vc-product-card--view-mode--list product-card--list'. Layout updated. Action controls (qty increase/decrease) accessible on in-stock cards.

testCases.title: Category - Sorting Options
testCases.notes: Sort dropdown has 3 options: Featured, Price (low-to-high), Price (high-to-low). Selecting 'Price: Low to High' produces ascending prices (first 6 prices: [1.20, 1.20, 1.20, 1.20, 1.20, 1.20]) — URL became ?sort=price-ascending. 'Price: High to Low' produces descending prices ($3,243 → $2,889) — URL ?sort=price-descending. Pagination-persistence step N/A — storefront theme uses infinite scroll; no numbered-page controls found (even on /kitchen-supplies with 141 results). Core sort logic verified.

testCases.title: Brands Page Loads
testCases.notes: /Brands HTTP 200. Page title 'QA & Brands'. H1 'Top brands'. 752 brand entries. Breadcrumb 'Home/Brands'. No TypeError.

testCases.title: Brand Navigation
testCases.notes: Clicked /brands/absolut_url_slug: HTTP 200, H1='Absolut', breadcrumb='Home/Brands/Absolut', URL reflects brand, facets available (21 facet elements). Tested 3 brands (Absolut, Lays, JAGERMEISTER) — all returned 0 products with 'There are no results found' empty state — data-level issue (brand→product linkage incomplete in B2B virtual catalog per memory feedback_storefront_virtual_catalog_link.md), not a navigation bug. Core invariants met: HTTP 200, URL reflects brand, heading matches brand name, breadcrumb correct, facets panel present.

testCases.title: Brand Product Count
testCases.notes: Precondition not met: /Brands page in Coffee theme is an A-Z brand directory (logos + names) with NO product count badges on any of the 752 brand entries. Checked via regex /\(\d+\)/ and /\d+\s*(item|product)/i — 0 of 752 entries have count badges. Cannot assert count_shown == count_on_listing. This appears to be a theme-level design choice (QA/Coffee theme simply does not render count badges on brand entries), not a regression.
testCases.failedAssertion: Precondition — brand entry with product count badge

testCases.title: PDP SEO - Meta Tags and Open Graph Tags
testCases.notes: PDP /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer/erdinger-alkoholfrei-german-alcohol-free-wheat-beer-12x500ml-cans inspected. OK: <title> present (non-empty but duplicated 5x — existing catalog data issue), og:title present, og:image present (valid image URL), og:url present. FAIL: link[rel=canonical] is ABSENT from <head>. FAIL: meta[name=description] is empty. FAIL: meta[property=og:description] is empty. meta[name=title] absent. Same failures observed on attempt 1 (same screenshot 001-CAT-040-pdp-missing-seo-meta.png). No existing JIRA ticket found.
testCases.failedAssertion: link[rel=canonical] must be present with href matching PDP URL; meta[name=description] + meta[property=og:description] must be non-empty

testCases.title: Category Page SEO - JSON-LD BreadcrumbList and Canonical URL
testCases.notes: Category /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer inspected. Visible breadcrumb 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer' — OK. FAIL: link[rel=canonical] is ABSENT. FAIL: <script type=application/ld+json> count=0 — no structured data at all on category page (no BreadcrumbList, no ItemList). Direct regression of the SEO assertions in BL-CAT-006. No parse errors (because no JSON-LD exists).

testCases.title: Multi-Level Category Navigation with Breadcrumbs
testCases.notes: Verified 4-level path /accessories/aliexpress/phones-and-accessories/holders-stands. H1='Holders & Stands (59 results)'. Breadcrumb shows 6 clickable ancestors: Home, Catalog, Accessories, Ali, Phones and Accessories + current 'Holders & Stands'. Navigated back to parent /accessories/aliexpress/phones-and-accessories — breadcrumb updates, URL updates, H1='Phones and Accessories'.

testCases.title: Empty Category Handling - No Products Message
testCases.notes: Used /brands/Lays as empty-category proxy (0 products). Empty state message 'There are no results found' displayed. H1='Lays' intact. Breadcrumb 'Home/Brands/Lays' functional for back-nav. No pagination controls. Filter panel present with 'Reset filters' action (UX choice, acceptable). No JS TypeError, no hydration warnings.

testCases.title: All Products Dropdown - Displays All Top-Level Categories
testCases.notes: Clicked 'All products' button on homepage — dropdown with role='menubar' aria-label='Categories' opened. 25 category items rendered. All items have non-empty text labels AND non-empty hrefs (no '#' or empty strings). Sample: 'Shop all categories'→/catalog, 'Shop by brand'→/Brands, 'Kitchen supplies'→/kitchen-supplies, etc.

testCases.title: All Products Dropdown - Category Link Navigates to Correct Category Page
testCases.notes: Clicked 'Snacks' href /snacks from the 'All products' dropdown. URL='/snacks', H1='Snacks', breadcrumb='Home/Catalog/Snacks', product grid rendered. Label matches destination.

testCases.title: Category SEO Slug URL Resolves Correctly
testCases.notes: Navigated /snacks slug URL. PASS parts: HTTP 200 (no redirect to ID-based URL), URL remains /snacks (no /category/{guid} redirect), H1='Snacks' non-empty, 38 product cards displayed. FAIL: link[rel=canonical] absent — same regression as CAT-041 (structured data SEO missing across all category pages).

testCases.title: Catalog Listing Page Renders Correctly at 768px Tablet Viewport
testCases.notes: Resized to 768x1024. /snacks listing: innerWidth=768, documentElement.scrollWidth=753 (no horizontal overflow), first product card width=485px (fits within viewport), hamburger menu button present, filter button present, main content width=753px. No clipping.

testCases.title: Breadcrumb Resets When Navigating from Subcategory Back to Parent via Main Menu
testCases.notes: VCST-4728 regression check: went /alcoholic-drinks (bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks') → /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer (bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer') → clicked 'Alcoholic Drinks' top-level in Main navigation menu. Breadcrumb correctly reset to 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks' (no stale 'Efes Beer'). URL updated. H1='Alcoholic drinks'. VCST-4728 does NOT regress.

testCases.title: Breadcrumb Resets When Using Browser Back Button from Subcategory to Parent
testCases.notes: Navigated /alcoholic-drinks → click-through to /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer (bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer') → browser Back button. URL reset to /alcoholic-drinks, breadcrumb reset to 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks', H1='Alcoholic drinks', subcategory name absent from breadcrumb. Direct reproduction of VCST-4728 scenario — passes.

testCases.title: Breadcrumb Reflects Correct Path When Navigating Between Sibling Subcategories
testCases.notes: Went /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer (bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer') → clicked parent in bc → /alcoholic-drinks/wine (sibling). Result: bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Wine' — exactly 4 items, no trace of previous sibling 'Efes'. URL reflects new sibling. H1='Wine'.

testCases.title: Breadcrumb Determinism on Rapid Forward-Back-Forward Navigation
testCases.notes: Rapid sequence: /alcoholic-drinks → /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer → /alcoholic-drinks → /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer. After 1s settle, bc='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer' (3 clickable + 1 current) — matches final destination. No stale intermediate state visible. URL=/alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer, H1='Efes Beer'. No race-condition console errors.

testCases.title: Configurable Product PDP - Required Sections Present
testCases.notes: Configurable product /products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/physical-1703 'Hoodie Base product with only File req'. H1 non-empty. Base price $300.00 → sale $250.00 (matches /^\$[0-9,]+\.\d{2}$/). Description section 'some descr' present. product-configuration widget rendered with title 'Configure the parameters'. Required indicator '*' visible on 'only File req *'. 11 images loaded (non-empty src). Customers bought together, shipment options widgets all present.

testCases.title: Configurable Product - Variation Selection Updates Price and SKU
testCases.notes: Configurable product /products-with-options/configurations/agent-test-config-laptop-20260324. Configuration sections 'RAM' + 'Storage' each with 3 radio options. Initial price-block shows $1,249.00 after first default selection. Clicked radio vc-radio-button-527-input (32GB RAM, +$250): Price and delivery block shows $1,249.00. Clicked radio vc-radio-button-508-input (16GB RAM, +$100): block updates to $1,099.00 — dynamic recalculation confirmed. Note: this product exposes Configuration sections with radio options rather than classical hasVariations=true SKU-based variations; the CSV assertion on 'SKU updates' is N/A for this product type but the core invariant 'price dynamically updates on selection' is verified. 19 POST /graphql calls all HTTP 200. No console TypeError.

rootCauseSummary.CAT-040: Storefront does not inject <link rel=canonical> or <meta name=description>/<meta property=og:description> content on PDP pages. og:title and og:image work but critical SEO primitives (canonical, description) are missing or empty. Affects discoverability and social sharing previews.
rootCauseSummary.CAT-041: Storefront does not inject <link rel=canonical> or <script type=application/ld+json> structured data on category pages. No BreadcrumbList JSON-LD at all. Affects search engine rich snippets and internal linking canonicalization.
rootCauseSummary.CAT-049: Same underlying root cause as CAT-041 — canonical tag is universally absent from category pages (verified /snacks, /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer). Routing works (slug resolves to 200, no ID-URL redirect) but SEO metadata injection is missing.

newBugsCandidates.title: PDP is missing link[rel=canonical] and meta descriptions (name=description + og:description empty)
Category pages missing link[rel=canonical] and application/ld+json BreadcrumbList structured data

consolidatedConsoleErrors: Multiple 404s on CMS product image assets (threecentsCherry-Soda-1_*.png, some product images) — catalog data issue, not code; non-blocking
vcst4728Status: No regression. CAT-059, CAT-060, CAT-061, CAT-062 all pass — breadcrumb correctly resets after main-menu nav, browser Back, sibling navigation, and rapid forward-back-forward sequences.
